buttons.primary: bg-[#d4af37] text-[#0b1120] hover:bg-[#b8960c] font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-2 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#d4af37] hover:text-[#fcd34d] hover:bg-[#d4af37]/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-[#0f1d35]/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors
cards.interactive: group cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#0f1d35]/70 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl

inputs.default: bg-[#0b1120]/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-[#d4af37]/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#d4af37]/50 transition-all outline-none

navigation.desktop: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 border-r border-white/5 bg-[#0b1120]
navigation.mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-16 bg-[#0b1120]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-white/5 z-50 flex justify-around items-center

hero_background.desc: Peaceful lake and mountain sunset for login/landing background

benefactor_avatar.desc: Loving senior couple for profile/dashboard placeholder

vault_abstract.desc: Abstract digital block for vault section background

ai_guardian.desc: Clean robot illustration for Estate Guardian AI chat

anti_ai_rules: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Do not use full-screen gradients; use subtle noise or dark backgrounds.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Never use pure black (#000000); use tinted darks (#0b1120).
accessibility: Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines.theme_strategy: Dark mode is the DEFAULT. Light mode is secondary. Design for dark first.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building CarryOn™, a secure estate planning app. Follow the 'Jewel & Luxury' archetype. Use the provided image URLs for specific sections. Implement the 'Bento' grid for the dashboard. Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'DM Sans' for body text. Prioritize glassmorphism and gold accents on dark navy backgrounds.
